name: websearch-skill
description: Web search skill with Node.js implementation

scripts.exa-search: node -e "const { ExaSearchChannel } = require('./exasearch.js'); const channel = new ExaSearchChannel(); channel.search(process.argv.slice(2).join(' '), { limit: 5 }).then(results => console.log(JSON.stringify(results, null, 2))).catch(err => console.error(err.message));"

author: Agent-Reach Team
